headline: Amazon Leans Into AI With Pinterest Deal And Anthropic IPO Upside
summary: Amazon.com (NasdaqGS:AMZN) signs a US$4b cloud services agreement with Pinterest to expand AI infrastructure on AWS. The Pinterest deal is described as the largest infrastructure commitment in Pinterest's history, focused on AI, cloud, and chip utilization. Anthropic files confidentially for an IPO at a valuation reported near US$1t, with Amazon holding an equity stake of about 21%. For investors watching Amazon.com (NasdaqGS:AMZN), these developments sit at the intersection of cloud...

headline: Cerebras Systems Partnerships With Amazon And OpenAI Put Valuation In Focus
summary: Cerebras Systems (NasdaqGS:CBRS) has expanded its AI infrastructure partnerships to include Amazon and OpenAI. CEO Andrew Feldman confirmed the company is working with a broad range of suppliers and is seeking new AI data center opportunities. Cerebras is pursuing additional collaborations with major tech providers, excluding Nvidia. Cerebras Systems focuses on wafer scale AI chips that target high performance training and inference workloads in data centers. The new agreements with Amazon...
